proton_bridge.description: Proton Bridge configuration for multiple ProtonMail accounts

mlesn.description: Legacy account reference - use mlesnews instead

glesn.description: Glenda's ProtonMail account - newly created, no emails yet
glesn.note: Account exists but is empty - will sync when emails arrive

proton_bridge_setup: 1. Install Proton Bridge on host PC from https://proton.me/mail/bridge
2. Sign in with mlesn ProtonMail account
4. Note IMAP port (default: 1143) and SMTP port (default: 1025)
5. Add glesn ProtonMail account to Bridge (if using Proton Family)
7. Store credentials in Azure Key Vault
multiple_accounts: Proton Bridge supports multiple accounts if using Proton Family
Each account gets its own IMAP/SMTP connection
If accounts share Bridge instance, use different ports or separate Bridge instances
For separate Bridge instances, configure different ports per account

nas_mail_hub.description: Emails from Proton Bridge are synced to NAS Mail Hub

daily_syphon.description: Daily work cycle syphons from NAS Hub (which includes ProtonMail emails)
daily_syphon.note: ProtonMail emails are already aggregated in NAS Hub, so syphon from there
